title: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
content: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.

title: At least 42 killed in Chad after water well dispute escalates
content: The dispute was initially between two families before escalating into a cycle of reprisal attacks.

originalTitle: Four ways to tackle football's frustrating 'tactical timeout'
title: Four ways to tackle football's frustrating 'tactical timeout'
content: Next season, leagues will be allowed to select from a series of trials to try to stop the goalkeeper tactical time-out. BBC Sport looks at the proposals.
